data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to track attendance per session (present/absent). However, the evidence does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm attendance tracking functionality. While the use case describes a scenario where a participant can attend multiple sessions, it does not explicitly demonstrate how attendance is recorded or tracked, leading to a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of attendance tracking mechanism or endpoints.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
